reasons: Kaja can suppress Akai and stop his Heavy Spin value.

proof.summary: Akai wants to spin and displace enemies, while Kaja's suppression can interrupt the engage and create a burst window.
worksBestWhen: Kaja saves Divine Judgment for Heavy Spin.
Kaja has vision of Akai's engage path.

reasons: Franco can lock Akai with Bloody Hunt and stop his engage momentum.

proof.summary: Akai needs uninterrupted spin uptime, while Franco's suppression can interrupt and hold him for follow-up.
worksBestWhen: Teammates are ready to burst or reposition.
Franco has vision before Akai starts the engage.
failureCases: Franco misses hook or suppresses too early.
Akai avoids Franco and spins on the backline.
Franco is forced to use ultimate on another diver.

reasons: Barats can suppress Akai with Detona's Welcome and stop Akai's displacement chain.

proof.summary: Akai wants to keep spinning through enemies, while Barats can devour and suppress him to interrupt the engage window.
worksBestWhen: Barats holds ultimate until Akai commits.
Barats' team follows up while Akai is suppressed.
Akai cannot bait Detona's Welcome first.
failureCases: Akai spins from outside Barats' reach.

reasons: Nana's Molina transform can interrupt Akai's Heavy Spin because morph or transform is one of the interruption types.

proof.summary: Akai wants to spin through enemies, while Nana can use transform threat to interrupt or zone his engage path.
worksBestWhen: Nana places Molina in Akai's entry route.
Nana waits for Akai to commit before using control.
Nana's team is ready to punish Akai after transform.
failureCases: Akai avoids Molina and flanks from another angle.
Nana wastes Molina before Akai engages.
Akai catches Nana before she sets up.

reasons: Diggie reduces the teamfight value of Akai's knockback control.

proof.summary: Akai wants to displace and trap enemies, while Diggie can protect nearby allies from non-suppression control and reduce follow-up value.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves Time Journey for Heavy Spin.
Diggie stays near the allies Akai wants to isolate.
The team repositions immediately after the cleanse or protection window.
failureCases: Akai separates allies outside Diggie's ultimate range.
Akai baits Time Journey before committing.
